Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

4.7/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Y-Not-Flooring to get the job done right.

“Y-Not-Flooring did an amazing job installing new hardwood floors in my living room. The team was professional, efficient, and the floors look absolutely beautiful. I highly recommend them!”

Maria S. Hardwood Flooring Installation
Sep 15, 2024

“I hired Y-Not-Flooring to install laminate flooring in my basement. They were quick and the price was fair. There was a small issue with a warped plank, but they came back and fixed it promptly. Good service.”

David K. Laminate Flooring Installation
Oct 28, 2024

“The team at Y-Not-Flooring transformed my outdated bathroom with new vinyl flooring. The installation was seamless, and the floor is completely waterproof. I couldn't be happier with the results!”

Jessica L. Vinyl Flooring Installation
Nov 5, 2024

“My hardwood floors were badly scratched and worn. Y-Not-Flooring's repair and restoration service brought them back to life! They look like new again. I was impressed with their attention to detail.”

Michael B. Floor Repair and Restoration
Dec 12, 2024

“We had Y-Not-Flooring install tile in our kitchen and are generally pleased. There were some delays due to material shortages, but the final product is excellent. Clean work, and the tile looks great.”

Sarah T. Tile Flooring Installation
Jan 20, 2025

“Y-Not-Flooring fixed a major subfloor issue in my apartment. They were thorough, explained everything clearly, and the new floor is perfectly level. Highly recommend their expertise.”

Anthony R. Subfloor Installation and Repair
Feb 3, 2025
Y Not Flooring

Trusted flooring contractor professionals serving New York, NY and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
